# AuditBoard

> Primary category: [enterprise-grc](../categories/enterprise-grc.md).

**One-liner** — A cloud audit-and-risk platform that grew from internal audit into a broad connected-risk (GRC + ESG) suite; now PE-owned by Hg.

**What it does** — AuditBoard started in internal audit / SOX and expanded into a "connected risk" platform: audit management, risk management, compliance (SOX, IT compliance), third-party risk, and ESG reporting. Strong traction with internal-audit and finance teams; serves 2,000+ enterprises including roughly half the Fortune 500.

**Where it sits in the stack** — [enterprise-grc](../categories/enterprise-grc.md), governance layer. System of record for audit/risk/compliance, not a runtime data control (`trifecta_relevance: none`). Can host AI-governance and model-risk attestations as part of compliance workflows, overlapping [ai-governance-platform](../categories/ai-governance-platform.md).

**Deployment & architecture** — SaaS. Integrates with ERP/finance systems, IT and security tooling; questionnaire and evidence-collection automation; AI features for audit/risk workflows.

**Positioning & differentiators** — Known for an audit-first heritage and usability, which differentiates it from risk-first incumbents [archer](archer.md) / [servicenow](servicenow.md) and no-code challengers [logicgate](logicgate.md) / [onspring](onspring.md). Strongest where internal audit drives the buy.

**Ownership, funding & M&A** — `acquired`. Acquired by **Hg** (software-focused PE) for over $3 billion — announced 2024-05-23, completed in 2024. Founded 2014; HQ Cerritos, CA; reached ~$200M ARR by late 2023; prior round Series B 2018 (Battery Ventures). The seed flag "AuditBoard acq by Hg 2024" is **confirmed** against Hg's own release. (high confidence)

**CTO / hedge-fund lens** — Day-1 GRC, particularly for funds where internal audit / SOX-style controls drive the requirement. Good fit for a fund with a real internal-audit function; for a small fund whose need is purely AI governance, a lighter or AI-specific tool may suffice.

**Competitors / alternatives** — [servicenow](servicenow.md), [archer](archer.md), [logicgate](logicgate.md), [onspring](onspring.md), [onetrust](onetrust.md).

**Open questions / to verify** — Post-Hg product roadmap; depth of native AI-governance vs. dedicated platforms.
